steps.t: Rukân asked you to inspect the dead fish that have washed up on the shore to the south-west.
Rukân asked you to inspect the dead fish that have washed up on the shore to the south-west.
Rukân is waiting for you to return from the shore with anything you might have discovered about the dead fish.
The fisherman Bôdo in the village of Khûtra may know something about the unpleasant fish-hook you found.
Bôdo told you he saw a box with similar decorations to the unpleasant fish-hook among the hills to the north-west of Khûtra.
You found the box Bôdo described among the hills north-west of Khûtra, and should now search it for some clue to its purpose.
Bôdo will be glad to have the fish-hooks out of the hands of the goblins and their corsair allies, even if it means he must now dispose of the unpleas…
Rukân is east of the Mâkhda Khorbo, north-west of Umbar Baharbêl.
